creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
On Wed, 30 Jun 1999, Richard Kiss wrote:

> sed 's/^X//' >./pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-./pkg/DESCR'
> XFrom the official Lua home page at <http://www.tecgraf.puc-rio.br/lua/>:
 [...]
> END-of-./pkg/DESCR

<hoek nit=wwwsites>

This should be 

WWW: http://www.tecgraf.puc-rio.br/lua/

</hoek>
